name: Local 355 Md
description_short: Local 355 MD Federal Credit Union serves Baltimore members with checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and payday alternative loans through online and branch banking.
description_long:
Local 355 MD Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union operating in the Baltimore, Maryland community. According to NCUA regulatory data, the institution serves members with deposit accounts and lending products typical of mid-sized credit unions. The organization maintains online banking capabilities and multiple service channels for member access.

The credit union offers a range of financial products including high-yield checking and savings accounts (Share Draft Accounts), auto loans for both new and used vehicles, mortgage financing, personal loans, and Payday Alternative Loans (PALs I). They provide competitive auto loan rates starting at 7.00% for both new and used vehicles, with an average loan amount of $17,000. Their website indicates they serve over 3 members with new auto loans and over 34 members with used auto loans. Additional services include investment planning, retirement planning, wealth management, and various financial calculators.

As a credit union, Local 355 MD emphasizes member benefits including exclusive discounts, dedicated financial planning services, and robust online and mobile banking capabilities. They offer payday alternative loans as a safer alternative to traditional payday lending, consistent with credit union regulatory frameworks under NCUA oversight. The institution provides compliance-focused deposit services meeting regulatory standards.

The website content presents operational information but contains limited detail on specific rates, fees, minimum balances, or membership eligibility requirements beyond geographic service to the Baltimore area. The NCUA data note showing "0 checking accounts held by members" creates uncertainty about current active membership levels. Prospective members must contact the institution directly at (410) 566-5700 for current product terms and detailed pricing. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Financial calculators (auto, mortgage, savings, credit card)
pros: Offers Payday Alternative Loans (PALs I) with lower interest rates and better terms than traditional payday loans
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 7.00% for both new and used vehicles
Comprehensive online and mobile banking capabilities with bill pay and ATM access
Multiple financial calculators available (auto, mortgage, savings, credit card payoff)
Provides dedicated financial planning and wealth management services to members
Federal credit union with NCUA insurance protection for deposits
Share Draft checking accounts with debit cards, physical checks, and ATM access
cons: NCUA data showing 0 checking accounts raises questions about current membership activity and product availability
Limited publicly available information on specific interest rates, fees, and minimum balance requirements
Relatively small lending footprint (3 new auto loans, 34 used auto loans outstanding) suggests limited scale
Geographic limitation to Baltimore, Maryland service area restricts membership eligibility
No information provided about membership eligibility criteria or enrollment process on available content
best_for: Baltimore-area residents seeking credit union membership with federal deposit insurance
Borrowers needing payday alternative loans with APR rates below 36%
Auto buyers looking for competitive new and used vehicle financing
diagnosis: Local 355 MD Federal Credit Union is best for Baltimore-area residents seeking traditional credit union banking services with payday alternative lending options and competitive auto financing. The primary caveat is limited publicly available product information and uncertainty about current membership levels based on NCUA data, requiring direct contact to verify current service availability and terms.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
